THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.title: Brambleburst
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold], then lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold].

THEWICKEN-NEEDLE_WHIP.title: Needle Whip
THEWICKEN-NEEDLE_WHIP.description: Lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold]. ALL enemies lose that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

THEWICKEN-HEXBURST.title: Hexburst
THEWICKEN-HEXBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each unique [gold]Debuff[/gold] the enemy has.

THEWICKEN-TOIL_AND_TROUBLE.title: Toil and Trouble

THEWICKEN-RATTLING_BOTTLES.description: Fill your empty potion slots with [gold]Rocks[/gold].

THEWICKEN-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.title: Hidden in Smoke
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.title: Bramble Shield
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {PerBramble:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Bramble[/gold] created this turn.

THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.title: Bind in Blood
THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.description: This turn, gain {BindInBloodPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] for each life lost.
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.title: Bottomless Cauldron
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.descriptio: Whenever you use a potion, create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BITTER_ROOT.title: Bitter Root
THEWICKEN-BITTER_ROOT.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain {BitterRootPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.title: Cloak of Moonlight
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.description: Whenever you create a card or potion, gain {CloakOfMoonlightPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_WALL.title: Bottle Wall
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_WALL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {PerPotion:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each potion used this turn.
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.title: Herbal Remedy
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.description: Destroy all of your potions. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each.
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.title: Unstable Reaction
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.description: Destroy all of your potions. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.
THEWICKEN-DANCE_AROUND_THE_CAULDRON.desc: At the end of your turn, create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold] for each point of unspent Energy.
THEWICKEN-ROOMY_SATCHEL.title: Roomy Satchel
THEWICKEN-PLAGUE.title: Plague
THEWICKEN-PLAGUE.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. You and ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].

THEWICKEN-BROOM_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next [gold]Familiar[/gold] power you play costs 0.
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.title: Pillage
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw a card for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.title: Stampede
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.description: Each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold] deals {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy.

THEWICKEN-GNASH.title: Gnash
THEWICKEN-GNASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus 5 for each [gold]Gnash[/gold] played this combat.
